[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001101 4
1 0110000 2
2 1101000 3
3 0100001 2
4 1011110 5
5 1011111 6
6 1001101 4
7 0110000 2

01 10 1111111 a
12 21 0000001 1
23 32 0010010 2
34 43 1111101 6
45 54 1011111 6 match 5
56 65 0011101 4
67 76 0001010 2
70 07 1011001 4

71 17 0100110 3
